narrative:
New Vienna (precinct in Clinton County) has 674 registered voters, with 59.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.8 percentage points.
